title: Particle disintegrator warhead
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:ParticleDisintegratorWarhead-HBDE.jpg|thumb|right|200px|A particle disintegrator warhead aboard a lightspeed torpedo fired from the Galaxy Gun]]
A '''particle disintegrator warhead''' was a type of [[Warhead/Legends|warhead]] installed aboard to [[lightspeed torpedo]]es.

==Characteristics==
[[File:Particle_disintegrator_warhead_egwt.png|thumb|left|200px|Particle disintegrator warhead [[:Category:Technical drawing images|schematics]]]]
Particle disintegrator [[Warhead/Legends|warheads]] were fitted to the tip of the massive [[lightspeed torpedo]]es fired by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Galaxy Gun]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]. The warhead was connected to the [[Missile/Legends|missile's]] [[Power core/Legends|power core]], and was energized by it as the [[Torpedo/Legends|torpedo]] neared its target [[Planet/Legends|world]]. After impacting the surface of a planet, the warhead triggered a series of nucleonic chain reactions that consumed everything in its path, explosively converting matter into energy.<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>

The warhead has a variable power setting; at full power, the warhead was capable of destroying an entire planet as the nucleonic reactions were sustained until all matter present had been consumed. However, at lower power settings, the warheads were able to selectively destroy [[City/Legends|cites]] and military bases while leaving the rest of the surface intact.<ref name="EGWT" />
